name: BB:Threats: Potential DoS Attack
notes: This Building Block identifies potential Denial-of-Service attack on a web server.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Potential DoS Attack on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Web Servers
when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Request Successful, Application.Request In Progress
when at least 50 events are seen with the same Source IP in 10 minutes
thresholds: when at least 50 events are seen with the same Source IP in 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Potential DoS Attack on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Web Servers
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Request Successful, Application.Request In Progress
AND when at least 50 events are seen with the same Source IP in 10 minutes
